data.raceComments: {"comment":"5. TROPEA was safely held on debut after settling well back when seventh (21.24) at this track over 350m. Better for the run and makes appeal this time. 3. BABA VOSS scored (20.86) last time out over 350m at this track three-and-a-half months ago. Has a good overall strike-rate and can find the frame here. 8. MELLCAT SKA found trouble in the run at this course and distance last time and fell. Has the ability and can atone with the right run. 2. DESPICABLE THIEF will be hard to beat despite making his debut at this circuit.","runners":[5,3,8,2],"exclusive":false}
